decoder_heading: What does this Privacy Policy cover?
ident_heading: What does this Privacy Policy cover?
heading_content_part: What does this Privacy Policy cover?This policy covers the Nutracheck service – including the Nutracheck Calorie Counter App and Nutracheck website. The service is operated by NutraTech Limited, a company registered in England, No. 5093196.

decoder_heading: What personal information do we collect about you?
ident_heading: What personal information do we collect about you?
heading_content_part: What personal information do we collect about you?

decoder_heading: Personal Data
ident_heading: Personal Data
heading_content_part: Personal Data:We collect, store and use the following personal information about you when you use the service:• First name• Email address• Encrypted password• Photo (if you upload this to the forum or Live Club weigh-in on the website)• IP address• Mobile device ID• Your browsing behaviour (when using the Nutracheck App and website)

decoder_heading: Special Category Data
ident_heading: Special Category Data
heading_content_part: Special Category Data:We also collect, store and use the following "special category" or "sensitive" fitness, health and dietary related personal information about you when you use the service, including through your personal profile and when you share this data in the users' forum:• Sex• Age• Height• Start and goal weight• BMI• Calorie intake (calculated through your nutritional entries)• Whether you are pregnant or breastfeeding

decoder_heading: Special Category Data
ident_heading: Special Category Data
heading_content_part: • Activity levels; and (Where you have opted to link to Apple Health, Google Fit or another fitness tracker – see Section 3 below) your step count, flights, active time and calories burned.You will have consented to us collecting, storing and using this fitness, health and dietary related personal information when you subscribed or under separate consent notice through the Nutracheck App. You can withdraw your consent by emailing us at privacy@nutracheck.co.uk, however this will mean we are no longer able to provide access to the Nutracheck service (see Section 6 below).

decoder_heading: Special Category Data
ident_heading: Special Category Data
heading_content_part: When you buy a subscription via the Nutracheck website, we use a secure payment processing company called WorldPay. The personal information you enter when making a payment falls underWorldPay's Privacy Policy. We keep a record of the payments you make in order to administer your membership, however we do not store your card payment details.

decoder_heading: Special Category Data
ident_heading: Special Category Data
heading_content_part: When you buy a subscription via the Nutracheck App, the in-App payment is processed by Apple iTunes (iOS devices) or Google Play (Android devices); we keep a record of your payment in order to administer your membership.

decoder_heading: Participate in the forums.
ident_heading: Participate in the forums
heading_content_part: Participate in the forums – this is entirely optional. The online community forum is part of the Nutracheck service to provide support for members. You do not need to share any personal information to read posts made by other members. However, if you wish to participate and post messages, you will be asked to validate that your email address is genuine, and to create a forum profile (this does not require you to use your real name). You can choose to show or hide the personal information you want other Nutracheck members to see about you within the privacy section in your forum profile.

decoder_heading: The Nutracheck iOS App provides the facility for you to link with Apple Health.
ident_heading: The Nutracheck iOS App provides the facility for you to link with Apple Health.
heading_content_part: The Nutracheck iOS App provides the facility for you to link with Apple Health. It is entirely optional, you have full control over this, and no data is shared without you setting the permissions first.You can choose to write data from your Nutracheck diary to Apple Health on a daily basis, including total calories, fat and other nutrients consumed by you. You can also read selected activity data from Apple Health and this will automatically appear in your Nutracheck diary, showing a breakdown of calories burned and which exercises contributed the most.

decoder_heading: The Nutracheck iOS App provides the facility for you to link with Apple Health.
ident_heading: The Nutracheck iOS App provides the facility for you to link with Apple Health.
heading_content_part: Activity data you give permission for Nutracheck to read from Apple Health will be stored in your Nutracheck account for your personal use but will not be shared with any third parties.

decoder_heading: The Nutracheck Android App provides the facility for you to link with Google Fit.
ident_heading: The Nutracheck Android App provides the facility for you to link with Google Fit.
heading_content_part: The Nutracheck Android App provides the facility for you to link with Google Fit. It is entirely optional, you have full control over this, and no data is shared without you setting the permission first. You can choose to allow Nutracheck to read selected activity data from Google Fit such as steps, active time and calories burned and in addition you can give permission to read distance related data. This data will automatically appear in your Nutracheck diary.

decoder_heading: The Nutracheck Android App provides the facility for you to link with Google Fit.
ident_heading: The Nutracheck Android App provides the facility for you to link with Google Fit.
heading_content_part: Activity data you give permission for Nutracheck to read from Google Fit will be stored in your Nutracheck account for your personal use but will not be shared with any third parties.

heading_content_part: (a) When you use the Nutracheck website, we use cookies to enable you to use the online service. A cookie is a small piece of data sent from our website that is stored on your computer by your web browser while you are using the Nutracheck website. We require you to allow the use of cookies in order for the service to work correctly. (b) We may also collect information about your online browsing behaviour collected by Google Analytics to help us improve the service and your experience. heading_content_part: How you can change your email preferences & data privacyYou have full control over how we contact you and use your personal information and can set your preferences at any time in your account.To tailor the email communications we send you and/or manage your data privacy, follow the instructions below:On the website:Sign in and hover over on 'My Profile' > select 'My Account' > 'Manage my email & privacy preferences'.In the App:Tap on 'More' in the bottom menu bar > 'Privacy Policy & Preferences'.

decoder_heading: How you can change your email preferences & data privacy

decoder_heading: Use of children's personal information
ident_heading: Use of children's personal information
heading_content_part: Use of children's personal informationWe do not knowingly collect or store any personal information about children under the age of 18. This service sets nutritional targets based on adult requirements, and as such is unsuitable for children.

decoder_heading: Your information rights under the General Data Protection Regulations (GDPR)
ident_heading: Your information rights under the General Data Protection Regulations (GDPR)
heading_content_part: Your information rights under the General Data Protection Regulations (GDPR)

decoder_heading: Your right to request access to your personal data (commonly known as a "data subject access request").
ident_heading: Your right to request access to your personal data (commonly known as a "data subject access request").
heading_content_part: Your right to request access to your personal data (commonly known as a "data subject access request"). This enables you to receive a copy of the personal data we hold about you and to check that we are lawfully processing it.

decoder_heading: Your right to rectify information.
ident_heading: Your right to rectify information
heading_content_part: Your right to rectify information – if any of the data we hold about you is incorrect, you can correct this yourself in your account, or you can contact us and we will update this for you within one calendar month. We may need to verify the accuracy of the new data you provide to us.

decoder_heading: Your right to be forgotten.
ident_heading: Your right to be forgotten
heading_content_part: Your right to be forgotten – this enables you to ask us to delete or remove personal data where there is no good reason for us continuing to process it. You also have the right to ask us to delete or remove your personal data where you have successfully exercised your right to object to processing (see below), where we may have processed your information unlawfully or where we are required to erase your personal data to comply with local law. Note, however, that we may not always be able to comply with your request of erasure for specific legal reasons which will be notified to you, if applicable, at the time of your request.

decoder_heading: Your right to restrict how we use your data.
ident_heading: Your right to restrict how we use your data
heading_content_part: Your right to restrict how we use your data – you can object to us using your personal information to limit the way we use it.

decoder_heading: Your right to data portability.
ident_heading: Your right to data portability
heading_content_part: Your right to data portability – you can request that we provide you with a file of your personal information within one calendar month.

decoder_heading: Your right to object.
ident_heading: Your right to object
heading_content_part: Your right to object – you can object to us using your personal information to carry out profiling.

decoder_heading: Your right to withdraw consent at any time where we are relying on consent to process your personal data.
ident_heading: Your right to withdraw consent at any time where we are relying on consent to process your personal data.
heading_content_part: Your right to withdraw consent at any time where we are relying on consent to process your personal data. However, this will not affect the lawfulness of any processing carried out before you withdraw your consent. If you withdraw your consent, we may not be able to provide certain products or services to you. We will advise you if this is the case at the time you withdraw your consent.

decoder_heading: Your right to withdraw consent at any time where we are relying on consent to process your personal data.
ident_heading: Your right to withdraw consent at any time where we are relying on consent to process your personal data.
heading_content_part: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise any of your rights set out, you can contact our Data Protection Officer by emailingprivacy@nutracheck.co.uk. If you have not heard back from us within 7 working days, we advise you contact us by telephone to ensure your request has been received by us and processed. The Helpline number is+44 (0)115 969 4660, lines are open Monday - Friday, 8.30am – 6pm (excluding Bank Holidays).

decoder_heading: Your right to withdraw consent at any time where we are relying on consent to process your personal data.
ident_heading: Your right to withdraw consent at any time where we are relying on consent to process your personal data.
heading_content_part: You can also write to the Data Protection Officer at NutraTech Ltd, Suite H (3rd floor) The Point, Welbeck Road, West Bridgford, Nottingham NG2 7QW.

decoder_heading: Keeping your personal information secure
ident_heading: Keeping your personal information secure
heading_content_part: Keeping your personal information secureWe take privacy and security very seriously. The service is hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS), a cloud computing platform with privacy features and end-to-end security built in.

decoder_heading: How long do we keep your personal information?
ident_heading: How long do we keep your personal information?
heading_content_part: How long do we keep your personal information?If you have not used the service at all in the last 3 years, we will delete your account and all related personal data from our system. However each time you sign into your account and use the service, the rolling 3 year period will reset. Once your account is deleted if you wish to re-join in the future, you will need to register a new account but none of your previous data will be recoverable.

Any changes posted on this page become effective immediately.Trading/correspondence address: The Point (Suite H) Welbeck Road, West Bridgford, Nottingham NG2 7QW.
